lore.mutantmore.mutant_husk_vocal_cords: The instrument from which the Mutant Husk voices its fury. Can be used to craft various weaponry associated with the Mutant Husk's abilities.
lore.mutantmore.husk_hammer: A mighty weapon that slams the ground, knocking away enemies and culminating in a geyser of sand.
lore.mutantmore.desert_horn: An area-of-effect weapon infused with the vocal wrath of the Mutant Husk that blows mobs away, dealing damage and leaving Quicksand in the wake of its rough harmony.
lore.mutantmore.sand_cannon: A ranged weapon that launches large boulders of sand, leaving a trail of Quicksand behind.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_frozen_zombie_spi: A chunk of rime that lined the back of the Mutant Frozen Zombie. Used in manufacturing various frigid gizmos.
lore.mutantmore.snowstorm_generator: A machine that, well, generates a snowstorm that freezes mobs caught within the circumference of it. Can also be used to convert skeletons into strays.
lore.mutantmore.freezing_fan: A rotary contraption that blows a frigid breeze onto mobs, freezing them in place for a moment.
lore.mutantmore.icicle_ammo_charge: An item used in tandem with the Adaptive Crossbow that over time, generates icicles to be discharged as projectiles.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_jungle_zombie_vin: A seed developed by the appendaged vine of a Mutant Jungle Zombie that can flourish on farmland and eventually be harvested as a Mutant Jungle Zombie Vine.
A vine identical to that of the Mutant Jungle Zombie's left appendage that can be tinkered with into toxic or tendril-based offenses.
lore.mutantmore.sentry_vine: A sentient, stationary, lush tendril that can be deployed to fight hostile mobs with its master.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_jungle_zombie_arm: A replica of the left appendage of a Mutant Jungle Zombie bearing the same set of abilities and furor exerted by one.
lore.mutantmore.leafblower: A handheld contraption harnessing the toxic potency of a Mutant Jungle Zombie used in eliminating weeds and pests alike, big or small.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_hoglin_tusk: The tusk of a Mutant Hoglin that can be fashioned into instruments of war and savagery.
lore.mutantmore.hog_helm: A piece of headgear that allows one to channel the fiery fury of a Mutant Hoglin into strife.
lore.mutantmore.hoglance: A lance of ivory that allows the wielder to penetrate the winds and charge forward in the horizontal direction they face.
lore.mutantmore.hogfist_gauntlet: A weapon arming the user with a mighty force to exert onto the ground, unleashing a shockwave of kinetic energy that strikes nearby mobs.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_wither_skeleton_a: An articulated collage of withered bones reassembled from the remains of the Mutant Wither Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Wither Skeleton armor.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_wither_skeleton_b: A powerful armor piece that consists of the withered bones of a Mutant Wither Skeleton.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_wither_skeleton_c: A powerful armor piece that consists of the withered bones of a Mutant Wither Skeleton. Grants a slight damage increase when worn.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_wither_skeleton_l: A powerful armor piece that consists of the withered bones of a Mutant Wither Skeleton.
A sundered leftover of the Mutant Wither Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Wither Skeleton gear.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_wither_skeleton_p: A sundered leftover of the Mutant Wither Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Wither Skeleton armor.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_wither_skeleton_r: A sundered leftover of the Mutant Wither Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Wither Skeleton gear.
An articulated collage of withered bones reassembled from the remains of the Mutant Wither Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Wither Skeleton armor.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_wither_skeleton_s: A sundered leftover of the Mutant Wither Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Wither Skeleton armor.
The skull of a Mutant Wither Skeleton. Can either be worn as a helmet, placed as decoration or used in crafting Wither Bombs.
lore.mutantmore.withered_scimitar: A saber capable of serrating the air, casting a projectile that afflicts struck mobs with Wither.
lore.mutantmore.wither_bomb: A deployable device that will exhale a vision-obscuring, blighted cloud simulating the Mutant Wither Skeleton's breath attack that afflicts all mobs caught within it with Wither. Just make sure to stay clear of its smog radius before it does its thing.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_blaze_core: The heart, the crux, the nexus, the vitally volatile nucleus of the Mutant Blaze, revolving in an aegis of inferno adoptable by the equally infernal.
lore.mutantmore.rodling_checker: A device used to view and modify attributes of your tamed Rodling.
lore.mutantmore.rodling_helmet: A piece of armor that can be equipped by your tamed Rodling for a great deal of extra protection.
lore.mutantmore.rodling_shields: A pair of defensive barriers that can be equipped by your tamed Rodling for a great deal of extra protection.
lore.mutantmore.heatstorm_generator: A machine that generates a searing cyclone that scorches mobs caught within it.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_blaze_shields: An item that creates shields akin to that of the Mutant Blaze's that orbit whichever entity it is used on, be it oneself or another.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_shulker_shell: The endborn carapace of a Mutant Shulker. Used in manufacturing sentry technology to fortify an area or oneself.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_shulker_turret: A powerful, arcane, stationary unit of warding that bombards hostile mobs with (Mutant) Shulker bullets.
lore.mutantmore.mutant_shulker_shield: A specialized shield with the ability to chuck a hefty area-of-effect projectile that levitates the struck mob for a few seconds.
lore.mutantmore.incomplete_formula_y: An item used to brew several ingredients into in order to concoct Formula Y.
lore.mutantmore.formula_y: A bottled substance that can be used to mutate various mobs into savage, beastly versions of their original selves... with minimal odds of success.
lore.mutantmore.incomplete_compound_z: An item used to brew many ingredients into in order to concoct Compound Z.
lore.mutantmore.compound_z: A bottled substance that can be used to mutate various mobs into savage, beastly versions of their original selves with guaranteed success.
lore.mutantmore.adaptive_crossbow: A ranged weapon used in tandem with an Icicle Ammo Charge that launches icicles as projectiles.
lore.mutantmore.music_disc_adrenaline_ru: An item that can be played in a Jukebox. Crafted from fragments obtained by subduing a mutant beast. It's a rare find.
lore.mutantmore.music_disc_aegis: An item that can be played in a Jukebox. Crafted from fragments obtained by subduing a mutant beast. It's a rare find.
lore.mutantmore.music_disc_forces_unknow: An item that can be played in a Jukebox. Crafted from fragments obtained by subduing a mutant beast. It's a rare find.
lore.mutantmore.disc_fragment_forces_unk: An item that is one piece of a shattered music disc. It's a rare find.
lore.mutantmore.disc_fragment_aegis: An item that is one piece of a shattered music disc. It's a rare find.
lore.mutantmore.disc_fragment_adrenaline: An item that is one piece of a shattered music disc. It's a rare find.
lore.mutantmore.quicksand: A block that halts the mobility of entities that walk through it.
lore.mutantmore.red_quicksand: A block that halts the mobility of entities that walk through it.
entity.mutantmore.mutant_shulker_trap.de: A stationary entity that chomps at entities that walk over it, slightly immobilizing them. When deployed by a Mutant Shulker, it will eventually turn into a shulker bullet.
entity.mutantmore.mutant_wither_skeleton: A decrepit yet vigorous hostile mob that is created with the application of Formula Y or Compound Z on a Wither Skeleton. It follows a relentless pattern of hacking and slashing, regularly inflicting Wither, casts projectiles that steal the struck mob's health, performs a brisk leap in the direction of its target and exhales a vision-obscuring, blighted smog that applies Wither. It erupts into sundered pieces of itself upon death. Serves as the mini-boss counterpart of the Wither Skeleton.
entity.mutantmore.mutant_blaze.descripti: A smoldering hostile mob that is created with the application of Formula Y or Compound Z on a Blaze. It exists with a heatstorm surrounding it at all times that scorches mobs within it, regularly overwhelms its target with a fusillade of fireballs and has a number of destructible shields that render it impervious until dismantled, though will recover over time. Consistent deflection of its fireballs knock it out, leaving a perfect opening for attack. It erupts into a clutter of its rods and drops its core as well as a knocked-out Rodling upon death. Serves as the mini-boss counterpart of the Blaze.
entity.mutantmore.mutant_shulker.descrip: A hull-cased hostile mob that is created with the application of Formula Y or Compound Z on a Shulker. It mainly attacks with projectiles of varying sizes, all of which home in on the target and levitate them. The large projectiles can be deflected to stun it and therefore provide an attack window. It can also maneuver aerially, lay out traps, heal within its shell, teleport next to its target before chomping on them or crushing them from above, the final two being the most lethal. It goes out in a bullet storm and drops its shell. Serves as the mini-boss counterpart of the Shulker.
entity.mutantmore.mutant_husk.descriptio: A hulking, gritty hostile mob that is created with the application of Formula Y or Compound Z on a Husk. It regularly displaces quicksand all over the battlefield and attacks by creating shockwaves, lobbing boulders of sand, calling reinforcements and sending its targets up in a geyser to the air before slamming them back down on the ground. Must be knocked down twice before it goes down permanently. Serves as the mini-boss counterpart of the Husk.
entity.mutantmore.rodling.description: A blaze pygmy summoned by the Mutant Blaze during battle or in the aftermath of its defeat, where it spawns knocked out and defenseless. The latter can be rescued and tamed with a right-click as well as modified and monitored with a Rodling Checker. Can be equipped with or fed various items for various effects.
entity.mutantmore.mutant_hoglin.descript: A behemoth hostile mob that is created with the application of Formula Y or Compound Z on a Hoglin. It is a highly aggresive melee fighter capable of serious damage in any single blow. It performs a charge attack when its target exits a range beyond its attack reach. When enough damage is taken within a specified amount of time, it enters an enraged state, greatly heightening its aggression and damage output. When slain, it collapses, generating a massively damaging shockwave. Serves as the mini-boss counterpart of the Hoglin.
entity.mutantmore.mutant_jungle_zombie.d: A hulking, overgrown hostile mob that is created with the application of Formula Y or Compound Z on a Zombie in a Jungle. It is very agile and adept at closing in distances to its target. It performs a variety of attacks that hold its target in place, inflicts poison and occassionally in between attacks or when knocked down, releases a vision-obscuring, noxious gas cloud that permeates far and wide. Unlike its other Mutant Zombie brethren, it does not call upon reinforcements. Must be knocked down five times before it goes down permanently. Serves as the Jungle-born mini-boss counterpart of the Zombie.
entity.mutantmore.mutant_frozen_zombie.d: A hulking, bitter-cold hostile mob that is created with the application of Formula Y or Compound Z on a Zombie in a cold biome. It exists with a snowstorm surrounding it at all times that freezes mobs within its radius and attacks by hurling icicles, causing waves of highly lethal ice spikes to erupt from the ground and throws large snowballs that freeze struck players in a block of ice that can only be escaped by clicking it enough times. Must be knocked down thrice before it goes down permanently. Serves as the Ice-born mini-boss counterpart of the Zombie.
